chain.thought: Explanation: Reviewing the 'winner' column, India won only once—in 1986. All other completed years are Pakistan wins or a draw (1988). Therefore, the only time one side (India) achieved a win in the rivalry was 1986.

judge_thought: Explanation: Reviewing the table’s “winner” column, Pakistan won in 1978, 1981, 1998, 1999, 2004, and 2006; 1988 was a draw; and India won only once, in 1986. Therefore, the “only time one side did something” (i.e., India winning) occurred in 1986, matching the Prediction Answer.
